prompt: Using the provided reference image, regenerate the same Nike surreal fashion ad almost exactly as written, but present it as a polished finished poster: keep the cool light-blue minimalist studio, the single oversized white Nike sneaker standing on its heel at a steep diagonal, the single female model in an all-white outfit leaning back against the shoe in right-facing three-quarter profile, the large background word "NIKE," and the glossy semi-reflective floor. Make the composition tighter and more cinematic, with the giant shoe dominating the left half and the model standing full-body on the right half, her hands in her pockets. Render the background "NIKE" text as 1 huge bold white word spanning behind the subjects, partially obscured by both the sneaker and the model. Add the bottom-center tagline as 2 lines of elegant white sans-serif text: "Made for comfort, worn for confidence." and "Because life feels better when you move without limits." Keep the top-right corner empty and do not add any extra text, logos, watermarks, credits, signatures, or captions. Ultra-clean premium advertising finish, soft diffused cool lighting, subtle floor reflections, high detail, 3:4 aspect ratio.
